x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Groups with no members create silent AI Agent routing failures -- work is assigned correctly but never actioned. Groups with no manager cannot escalate automatically.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Assignment Group Membership and Manager Population
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate group membership and manager fields on active ITSM groups via sys_user_group_list.do. Use import sets to bulk-assign from HR data. Groups with no members create silent AI Agent routing failures -- work is assigned but never actioned.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: Assignment Group Membership and Manager Population

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_7ef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Groups with no members create silent AI Agent routing failures -- work is assigned correctly but never actioned. Groups with no manager cannot escalate automatically.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Assignment Group Membership and Manager Population</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var totalGr = new GlideAggregate('sys_user_group');
    totalGr.addQuery('active', true);
    totalGr.addQuery('type', 'itil');
    totalGr.addAggregate('COUNT');
    totalGr.query();
    var total = totalGr.next() ? parseInt(totalGr.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active ITSM groups found',
            finding: 'No active ITSM assignment groups found. Group membership cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var withMembers = 0;
    var groupGr = new GlideRecord('sys_user_group');
    groupGr.addQuery('active', true);
    groupGr.addQuery('type', 'itil');
    groupGr.query();
    while (groupGr.next()) {
        var memGr = new GlideRecord('sys_user_grmember');
        memGr.addQuery('group', groupGr.getUniqueValue());
        memGr.setLimit(1);
        memGr.query();
        if (memGr.next()) withMembers++;
    }

    var withManagerGr = new GlideAggregate('sys_user_group');
    withManagerGr.addQuery('active', true);
    withManagerGr.addQuery('type', 'itil');
    withManagerGr.addQuery('manager', '!=', '');
    withManagerGr.addAggregate('COUNT');
    withManagerGr.query();
    var withManager = withManagerGr.next() ? parseInt(withManagerGr.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var memberPct = Math.round((withMembers / total) * 100);
    var managerPct = Math.round((withManager / total) * 100);
    var worstPct = Math.min(memberPct, managerPct);

    var actualValue = 'Total ITSM groups: ' + total + ' | With members: ' + memberPct + '% | With manager: ' + managerPct + '%';
    var cloneNote = 'NOTE: If running on a non-production clone, sys_user data is typically stripped — verify on production before treating as a blocker. ';

    if (worstPct >= 80) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: cloneNote + 'Assignment groups are well configured. AI Agent routing has valid group membership and manager data.' };
    } else if (worstPct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: cloneNote + 'Group membership (' + memberPct + '%) or manager assignment (' + managerPct + '%) below target. AI Agent routing may fail for some groups.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: cloneNote + 'Group membership (' + memberPct + '%) and/or manager (' + managerPct + '%) critically low. AI Agent routing will not function correctly without populated groups.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000351</number><order>370</order><remediation_guidance>Populate group membership and manager fields on active ITSM groups via sys_user_group_list.do. Use import sets to bulk-assign from HR data. Groups with no members create silent AI Agent routing failures -- work is assigned but never actioned.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>7ef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Assignment Group Membership and Manager Population</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_7ef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851ca5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: Assignment Group Membership and Manager Population

sys_audit_delete.display_value: Assignment Group Membership and Manager Population

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Assignment Group Membership and Manager Population
